interpretation: TOST at full n=228: 95% CI on (cos_actual − per-customer-mean-distractor-cos) is [-0.0103, -0.0038]. If this CI lies entirely inside ±0.01, the effect is formally equivalent to null. p-significance at this n with paired-diff +0.0016 vs the within-bucket permutation null is a power artifact; the per-pair effect is well below the 0.01 'practically null' bound. H9a should be re-labeled 'statistically detectable, practically null'.
